# HPD.ML.TimeSeries.SsaChangePointDetector

- Package: `HPD-ML-TimeSeries` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Kind: `class`

IScanTransform for SSA-based change point detection. Same scoring as spike detection but with martingale-based alerting and martingale reset on alert (cooldown).

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class SsaChangePointDetector : HPD.ML.Abstractions.IScanTransform<HPD.ML.TimeSeries.SsaAnomalyState>, HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```

